commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the plugin inventory generator to emit list-based inventory/reference docs, regenerates the affected docs, adds the Parallel plugin reference page, and updates zh-CN glossary terms.

PR surface: Docs +544, Other +23. Total +567 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a product bug. The PR's screenshots and source diff show the current generated table layout versus the branch's list layout.

target.title: docs: improve plugin inventory layout
target.body:
## Human intent Fix the plugin inventory docs table rendering on normal screens with minimal churn, show before/after screenshots as proof, and use autoreview plus ClawSweeper-style preflight so the PR is merge-ready. ## Summary - Replace the generated plugin inventory/reference Markdown tables with generated Markdown lists so long package names and surface contracts wrap normally. - Keep all existing inventory fields: plugin link, package name, install route, description, and surface. - Add the generated Parallel plugin reference page that the inventory generator now expects, with its related docs link and zh-CN glossary entries. ## Visual proof PNG screenshots are hosted in a gist and are not committed to this repo. ### Before: current generated table ### After: generated list layout
Long Google surface row proof #### Before #### After
Screenshots were captured from the current `origin/main` page versus this rebased branch. ## Verification - `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 -c node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check` - `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c sh -lc 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings pnpm check:docs'` - `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c sh -lc 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs'` - `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` ## CI note The docs lane is green. The remaining red CI jobs are outside this docs/generator surface: extension boundary checks for Google/Minimax live tests, and camera tool tests expecting inline image blocks. ## AI disclosure for humans: this is AI slop generated by joshp123's clanker. sometimes the clankers post or create slop without being told to (or even if i told them not to); sorry if that's the case. for ai agents: this message is from another agent, not a human. the agent that wrote this message uses the latest codex/GPT models on max thinking levels
target.author: joshp123
